thin.$description: Thin border (0.0625rem / 1px at the default root) — hairlines, dividers, and default control borders.

thick.$description: Thick border (0.125rem / 2px at the default root) — emphasis borders and selected states.

thicker.$description: Thicker border (0.25rem / 4px at the default root) — focus rings and high-emphasis outlines.

default.$description: Default border width — aliases thin so the system-wide default can be retuned in one place.
